Event: Cornucopia Island October 2025
Event Date: 16/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: BK15
Forbidden Knowledge Book

Once in a while, the unit starts incinerating 2 random enemy units for 4 sec. Units being incinerated receive 250000 pure damage every second for 4 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around units being incinerated receive pure damage equal to 75% of the damage received by the original target. After the incineration ends, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 4 sec.

For the entire duration of the battle, the book's owner has their spell power increased by 10% for every enemy unit that is burning or being incinerated. Stacks up to 8 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝

Event: Cornucopia Island October 2025

Event date: 16/10/2025

Sage bot code: BK15

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 5 secs
